data.content: Implementation review rejected: the Conversation Log font/contrast work in src/components/agent-history-view.tsx and src/components/interaction-picker.tsx appears in scope and consistent with the request, but the required sanity gates do not pass in this checkout. bunx tsc --noEmit and bun run build both fail on Storybook files under work/ (for example work/foolery-c355/src/stories/beat-form.stories.tsx:44 uses invalid prop isLoading, with additional repeated story prop/module errors in work/foolery-d486 and work/foolery-ee66). bun run test passes. Fix the repo-level type/build failures and resubmit for implementation review.
